entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low rainfall and high temperatures where soil and nutrient loss are significant concerns

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The upper layer of earth in which plants grow, subject to loss in semi-arid tropical regions

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: Material composed of organic compounds that have not been fully decomposed, declining in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential chemical elements required for plant growth that are being lost in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: NUTRIENT IMBALANCE
entities.description: A state where the proportions of essential plant nutrients are not optimal, reported in rainfed areas

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The carbon component of soil organic matter whose decline contributes to nutrient imbalance

entities.name: RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural regions that rely solely on rainfall for water, specifically in Asia and Sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent containing rainfed areas with reported nutrient imbalance

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region containing rainfed areas with reported nutrient imbalance

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where extensive soil analysis was performed across multiple states

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where soil samples were collected for analysis

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: An Indian state where soil samples were collected for analysis

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where soil samples were collected for analysis

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: An Indian state where soil samples were collected for analysis

entities.name: PHOSPHOROUS
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient found to be low to medium in analyzed Indian soil samples

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient found to be medium to high in analyzed Indian soil samples

entities.name: SULPHUR
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient found to be low in analyzed Indian soil samples

entities.name: BORON
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient found to be low in analyzed Indian soil samples

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient found to be low in analyzed Indian soil samples

entities.name: SOIL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of analyzing soil samples to determine nutrient and organic carbon status
